name: Hanwha Solutions Corporation
summary: Hanwha Solutions Corporation operates in the chemicals, energy solutions, and advanced materials business areas in South Korea and internationally. The company offers petrochemical products; and photovoltaic cells and modules. In addition, it builds and operates power plants, as well as retails electricity; and provides lightweight composite materials, photovoltaic materials, and electronic materials. The company is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
